runes.name: Precision
runes.longDesc: <tags=masteriesTooltipAD>

runes.name: Press the Attack
runes.shortDesc: Attack and then exploit the weakness.
runes.longDesc: After taking damage from an enemy champion, your next attack deals bonus damage and slows them.

runes.name: Lethal Tempo
runes.shortDesc: Gain attack speed when in combat.
runes.longDesc: Gain stacking attack speed when in combat with enemy champions.

runes.name: Fleet Footwork
runes.longDesc: After attacking, gain movement speed. After regaining health, gain additional movement speed.

runes.name: Conqueror
runes.shortDesc: Gain bonus damage when in combat.
runes.longDesc: Gain stacks of adaptive force when in combat with enemy champions. Maximum stacks and bonus damage scale with level.

runes.name: Domination
runes.longDesc: <tags=masteriesTooltipAD>

runes.name: Electrocute
runes.longDesc: Hitting an enemy champion with 3 separate attacks within 2 seconds deals bonus damage.

runes.name: Predator
runes.longDesc: Your next attack against an enemy champion consumes the enhanced state and deals bonus damage.

runes.name: Dark Harvest
runes.longDesc: Collect souls from enemies damaged by your attacks. Damaging a low-health enemy deals bonus adaptive damage.

runes.name: Sorcery
runes.longDesc: <tags=masteriesTooltipAD>

runes.name: Summon Aery
runes.longDesc: Your attacks and abilities send a small arc towards the target that deals damage on hit.

runes.name: Arcane Comet
runes.longDesc: Damaging an enemy champion with an ability causes a small comet to fall at the target location.

runes.name: Phase Rush
runes.longDesc: Hitting an enemy champion with 3 separate attacks or abilities grants a burst of movement speed.

runes.name: Resolve
runes.longDesc: <tags=masteriesTooltipAD>

runes.name: Grasp of the Undying
runes.longDesc: Every 4 seconds in combat, your next attack gains bonus damage and heals you.

runes.name: Aftershock
runes.longDesc: After crowd controlling an enemy champion, gain bonus resistances and later deal damage to nearby enemies.

runes.name: Guardian
runes.longDesc: Guard allies within range and while near them. When they take damage, you shield them.

runes.name: Inspiration
runes.longDesc: <tags=masteriesTooltipAD>

runes.name: Glacial Augment
runes.longDesc: When you attack an enemy, an Augment fires at them and slows them.

runes.name: Unsealed Spellbook
runes.longDesc: Swap your Summoner Spells at the start of the game. Your first swap is always free.

runes.name: First Strike
runes.longDesc: When you initiate combat with champions, you gain bonus damage and gold.
